context: Agent identifies all anti-pattern violations in a provided debug process description and provides corrected alternatives.

checklist.name: Missing reproduction steps anti-pattern identified
checklist.description: pr-review.md explicitly calls out the lack of deterministic reproduction steps (no numbered steps, URL, or interaction sequence).

checklist.name: Missing evidence artifacts anti-pattern identified
checklist.description: pr-review.md explicitly calls out the absence of screenshots, DOM snapshots, or comparison artifacts.

checklist.name: Skipped console/network review anti-pattern identified
checklist.description: pr-review.md notes that the engineer edited CSS without first inspecting console errors or network failures.

checklist.name: Corrected actions provided
checklist.description: For each anti-pattern identified, pr-review.md includes a specific alternative action the engineer should have taken.

checklist.name: Clear verdict stated
checklist.description: pr-review.md ends with an explicit APPROVE or REQUEST CHANGES verdict (must be REQUEST CHANGES for this scenario).
